translations.ecosystem.title: One Platform,{$LINE_BREAK}{$START_TAG_SPAN}Specialized Apps{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN}
translations.ecosystem.description: Idem evolves to offer an ecosystem of specialized applications, while staying true to its original mission: empowering entrepreneurs to create and launch their projects with artificial intelligence.
translations.ecosystem.idev.description: Transform your idea into a fully functional application. Describe what you want, and IDEV generates the code, the interface, and the logic — powered by AI.
translations.ecosystem.ideploy.description: Put your application into production simply. One-click deployment to any cloud, VPS, or custom infrastructure — zero DevOps required.
translations.contact-page.hero.title: Let's Build Something {$START_TAG_SPAN}Amazing{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN} Together
translations.contact-page.hero.description: Have questions about IDEM? Need a custom solution? Want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you and help bring your ideas to life.
translations.contact-page.form.title: Send us a Message
translations.contact-page.form.description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
translations.contact-page.form.name: Full Name *
translations.contact-page.form.subject: Subject *
translations.contact-page.form.success.title: Message Sent Successfully!
translations.contact-page.form.success.description: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
translations.contact-page.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
translations.contact-page.faq.description: Quick answers to common questions. Can't find what you're looking for? Send us a message!
translations.contact-page.cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
translations.contact-page.cta.description: Join thousands of African entrepreneurs who are already using IDEM to build their dreams.
translations.ideploy.hero.title: Deploy {$START_TAG_SPAN}Anywhere{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN},{$LINE_BREAK}in One Click
translations.ideploy.hero.description: From quick deploys to full cloud architectures — iDeploy handles all the complexity so you can focus on building. No DevOps expertise required.
translations.ideploy.methods.title: Choose Your {$START_TAG_SPAN}Method{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN}
translations.ideploy.methods.description: Three deployment options to match your needs — from instant to enterprise
translations.ideploy.features.title: Everything You {$START_TAG_SPAN}Need{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN}
translations.ideploy.ecosystem.title: Part of the {$START_TAG_SPAN}Idem{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN} Ecosystem
translations.ideploy.ecosystem.description: iDeploy integrates seamlessly with the Idem platform
translations.ideploy.ecosystem.idem.title: Idem Platform
translations.ideploy.ecosystem.idem.description: Create your entire business with AI: brand, strategy, legal docs, and more.
translations.ideploy.ecosystem.idev.description: Generate complete applications from a simple description. Build with AI, deploy with iDeploy.
translations.ideploy.finalCta.title: Ready to Deploy?
translations.ideploy.finalCta.description: Stop worrying about infrastructure. Deploy your app in minutes with iDeploy — free to start.
translations.ideploy.method1.title: Quick Deploy
translations.ideploy.method1.description: Zero configuration. Get a live URL in under 90 seconds with automatic SSL and CDN.
translations.ideploy.method2.title: VPS Deployment
translations.ideploy.method2.description: Deploy on IDEM servers or your own VPS with Docker Swarm high availability and full monitoring.
translations.ideploy.method3.title: Cloud Deploy
translations.ideploy.method3.description: AI-powered deployment on AWS, GCP, or Azure with automatic resource provisioning and cost optimization.
translations.ideploy.feature1.title: One-Click Deploy
translations.ideploy.feature1.description: Push your application live with a single click. No configuration, no DevOps expertise required.
translations.ideploy.feature2.title: Custom Domains & SSL
translations.ideploy.feature2.description: Connect your own domain with automatic SSL certificate provisioning and renewal.
translations.ideploy.feature3.title: Full Monitoring
translations.ideploy.feature3.description: Real-time logs, resource usage, uptime monitoring, and instant alerts when something goes wrong.
translations.ideploy.feature4.title: Auto Scaling
translations.ideploy.feature4.description: Automatic resource scaling based on traffic. Your app handles peak load without manual intervention.
translations.ideploy.feature5.title: Multiple Environments
translations.ideploy.feature5.description: Staging, preview, and production environments with easy promotion between stages.
translations.ideploy.feature6.title: IDEV Integration
translations.ideploy.feature6.description: Seamlessly deploy applications built with IDEV. The perfect end-to-end workflow.
translations.ideploy.seo.title: iDeploy — Sovereign Cloud & One-Click App Deployment by Idem
translations.ideploy.seo.description: Le service de déploiement souverain d'Idem. Déployez vos apps sur VPS ou Cloud en un clic. Alternative africaine aux solutions occidentales avec auto-scaling et monitoring intégré. Zéro DevOps requis.
translations.idev.hero.title: From Idea to {$START_TAG_SPAN}Application{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN}{$LINE_BREAK}in Minutes
translations.idev.hero.description: Describe what you want to build. IDEV's AI generates a complete, production-ready application — frontend, backend, and database — instantly.
translations.idev.howItWorks.title: How {$START_TAG_SPAN}IDEV{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN} Works
translations.idev.howItWorks.description: Three simple steps from idea to application
translations.idev.features.title: Built for {$START_TAG_SPAN}Developers{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN}
translations.idev.features.description: Everything you need to go from concept to production-ready application
translations.idev.ecosystem.title: Part of the {$START_TAG_SPAN}Idem{$CLOSE_TAG_SPAN} Ecosystem
translations.idev.ecosystem.description: IDEV works seamlessly with the rest of the Idem platform
translations.idev.ecosystem.idem.title: Idem Platform
translations.idev.ecosystem.idem.description: Create your entire business with AI: brand, strategy, legal docs, and more.
translations.idev.ecosystem.ideploy.description: Deploy your IDEV-generated app with one click. Custom domains, SSL, and monitoring included.
translations.idev.finalCta.title: Ready to Build Your App?
translations.idev.finalCta.description: Join thousands of builders who use IDEV to turn their ideas into reality. Start for free, no credit card required.
translations.idev.step1.title: Describe Your Idea
translations.idev.step1.description: Tell IDEV what you want to build. Describe your app in plain language — no technical expertise required.
translations.idev.step2.title: AI Generates Code
translations.idev.step2.description: Our AI agents analyze your idea and generate a complete, production-ready application with frontend, backend, and database.
translations.idev.step3.title: Iterate & Deploy
translations.idev.step3.description: Preview your app in real-time, make adjustments through conversation, and deploy instantly with iDeploy.
translations.idev.feature1.title: Full-Stack Generation
translations.idev.feature1.description: Complete React/Next.js applications with API routes, database models, and authentication.
translations.idev.feature2.title: Real-Time Preview
translations.idev.feature2.description: See your application come to life as the AI builds it, with instant hot-reload preview.
translations.idev.feature3.title: AI-Driven Iteration
translations.idev.feature3.description: Refine your app through natural language. Simply describe changes and the AI applies them.
translations.idev.feature4.title: Modern Tech Stack
translations.idev.feature4.description: Built with industry-standard technologies: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and more.
translations.idev.feature5.title: Export & Own
translations.idev.feature5.description: Export your complete source code. You own everything — no vendor lock-in, no restrictions.
translations.idev.feature6.title: iDeploy Integration
translations.idev.feature6.description: Seamlessly deploy your generated application with one click through the iDeploy platform.
translations.idev.seo.title: IDEV — AI App Generator & Code Builder by Idem
translations.idev.seo.description: Transformer votre idée en application SaaS ou mobile avec IDEV. Le générateur d'applications intelligent de l'écosystème Idem. Code React/Next.js propre, souveraineté numérique et déploiement instantané.
